description: Beyond the Veil Patch 10 (19 June 2023) — Hideout Energy and Power Changes, Crystal Arena and League Changes, Single-Server Changes, Knightfall Abbey Rewards Adjustments, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Hideout Energy and Power Changes

items.text: If a guild owns a territory in the same zone as their Hideout, that Hideout's Energy depletion rate is reduced (i.e. it holds its Energy more effectively)

subitems.text: Roads Hideouts cannot gain the Territory Bonus

items.text: Increased HQ Hideout Power Bonus from 50% to 100%
Increased HQ Hideout Energy Penalty from 35% to 51%
Increased Energy drain rate for Hideouts and HQ Hideouts at medium-to-high levels
Decreased Energy granted by Outlands Hideout Power Cores from 100% to 75%

sections.searchable_text: Hideout Energy and Power Changes If a guild owns a territory in the same zone as their Hideout, that Hideout's Energy depletion rate is reduced (i.e. it holds its Energy more effectively) Level 0-3: -12.5% Level 4: -14.2% Level 5: -16.6% Level 6: -20% Level 7: -25% Level 8: -33.3% Level 9: -50% Roads Hideouts cannot gain the Territory Bonus Increased HQ Hideout Power Bonus from 50% to 100% Increased HQ Hideout Energy Penalty from 35% to 51% Increased Energy drain rate for Hideouts and HQ Hideouts at medium-to-high levels Level 4: +16.6% Level 5: +20% Level 6: +25% Level 7: +33.3% Level 8: +50% Level 9: +100% Decreased Energy granted by Outlands Hideout Power Cores from 100% to 75%

sections.heading: Crystal Arena and League Changes

subsections.heading: 5v5 Crystal League and Crystal Arena
subsections.searchable_text: 5v5 Crystal League and Crystal Arena Changed Map: Spade → Cross Scoring Round: 150s → 120s Scoring Changed 1 Runestone advantage 25 → 20 2 Runestones advantage 35 → 30 3 Runestones advantage 50 → 40

sections.searchable_text: Crystal Arena and League Changes Crystal Arena 5v5 Crystal League and Crystal Arena Changed Map: Spade → Cross Scoring Round: 150s → 120s Scoring Changed

sections.heading: Single-Server Changes

subitems.text: All Castle and Castle Outpost Treasure spawn times moved 30 minutes earlier, making it easier to contest Territory Fights and claim Castle Chests afterwards
Updated Guild Logos on Beta Season Winner Statues in open world
Season 18 West Statues are now placeable furniture items

sections.searchable_text: Single-Server Changes Albion East All Castle and Castle Outpost Treasure spawn times moved 30 minutes earlier, making it easier to contest Territory Fights and claim Castle Chests afterwards Updated Guild Logos on Beta Season Winner Statues in open world Albion West Season 18 West Statues are now placeable furniture items

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: Immunity to another Time Freeze vs Players: 5s → 11s

stats.name: Immunity to another Time Freeze vs Players

subitems.text: Reworked Cleanse logic inside the area; CC effects and debuff are now instantly removed when applied (preventing micro-stuns inside the area)

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Time Freeze (Great Arcane) Immunity to another Time Freeze vs Players: 5s → 11s The Void (Malevolent Locus) Reworked Cleanse logic inside the area; CC effects and debuff are now instantly removed when applied (preventing micro-stuns inside the area)

subsections.heading: Bows

subitems.text: Damage keeps increasing when multiple targets are hit at the same time.

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Demon Arrow (Wailing Bow) Damage keeps increasing when multiple targets are hit at the same time.

subsections.heading: Daggers

subitems.text: Fixed missing AoE escalation, reduced base damage to make up for this change

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Chain Slash (all Daggers) 1st Hit Damage: 90 → 110 2nd Hit Damage: 110 → 125 3rd Hit Damage: 130 → 140 4th Hit Damage: 150 → 155 Merciless Finish (Bridled Fury) Fixed missing AoE escalation, reduced base damage to make up for this change 0 Charge Damage: 79 → 63.2 1 Charge Damage: 126 → 100.8 2 Charge Damage: 189 → 151.2 3 Charge Damage: 250 → 200 Demonfang Resilience Penetration: 50% → 40% Bridled Fury Resilience Penetration: 75% → 50%

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs

subitems.text: When cast on yourself or an ally the target gains a 60% move speed bonus for 1.6s

subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Burning Field (all Fire Staffs) Damage of initial hit: 52 → 70 Flame Blast (all Fire Staffs) When cast on yourself or an ally the target gains a 60% move speed bonus for 1.6s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Holy Touch (Lifetouch Staff) Tick Interval: 0.6s → 0.5s Amount of Ticks: 6 → 5 Heal per tick: 64 → 76.8

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Vendetta (Camlann Mace) Projectile Range: 18m→ 21m Projectile Speed: 19.23 m/s → 23.07 m/s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

subitems.text: Can no longer target mounted players

subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Soul Link (Ironroot Staff) Can no longer target mounted players

subsections.heading: Spears

subitems.text: Number of Ticks: 8 → 6 (This reduces the max channel duration by 0.6s)
Damage per Tick: 35.96 → 47.94 (total channel damage stays the same)

subsections.searchable_text: Spears Forest of Spears (all Spears) Number of Ticks: 8 → 6 (This reduces the max channel duration by 0.6s) Damage per Tick: 35.96 → 47.94 (total channel damage stays the same)

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Fearless Strike (Carving Sword) Resistance Reduction 0 Stacks: 0.07 → 0.05 1 Stack: 0.11 → 0.10 2 Stacks: 0.17 → 0.15 3 Stacks: 0.24 → 0.2

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Create Opening (all War Gloves) Cast Range: 2m → 2.5m Earth Crusher (Ravenstrike Cestus) Self Slow: 50% → 25% 0 Charge Damage: 160 → 166 1 Charge Damage: 170 → 176 2 Charge Damage: 180 → 187 3 Charge Damage: 190 → 198 Spiked Gauntlet Resilience Penetration: 60% → 50% Ravenstrike Cestus Resilience Penetration: 60% → 50%

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes After Image (Mistwalker Shoes) Recast time for return teleport: 4s → 6s

subsections.heading: Capes

subitems.text: Caster is immune to purges while the shield is active
Debuff removal and debuff immunity removed

subsections.searchable_text: Capes Fey Barrier (Brecilien Cape) Caster is immune to purges while the shield is active Debuff removal and debuff immunity removed Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape) Slow Strength: 20% → 40% Force Pulse (Avalonian Cape) Cooldown: 37s (700 IP), 26.5s (1400 IP), → 30s (across all IP)

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where zone map could not be closed by clicking outside
Fixed issue where interacting with Island Merchant with Social UI open caused overlap
Fixed issues where searching in Guild Season Rankings did not function correctly and window could become stuck when logging out with UI open
Fixed issue where emptied Coffers still showed on minimap
Added error message when attempting to execute players while in Hostile Dismount state
Fixed issue where Ethereal Form (Feyscale Sandals) reduced its channel time when hit
Ethereal Path (Harvester Workboots): Removed incorrect lingering invisibility text from tooltip; revealing the invisibility no longer interrupts dash or removes forced movement immunity

items.text: Fixed issue where Invaders could lose the Corrupted Dungeon Debuff by downing themselves before invading other players' Dungeons
Improving quality of Brecilien Owl mounts no longer increases the negative carry weight effect
Improved behavior of keyboard (WASD) movement: While channeling spells, any new movement keypress will cancel the channel
Fixed issue where character models could appear and disappear
Fixed issue where Brecilien could not be selected as a destination at the Travel Planner when having Home set to a Mists Island
Fixed issue where downing yourself with Bloodthirsty Blade (Dagger) would expel you from the Mists
Fixed issue where chests in Castles and Outposts would display incorrect rarity
Fixed issue where reflecting damage could put a player into an active combat state
Undead Archers can now be rooted or slowed as they run away
[CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where fishing would cancel on bite
Additional graphical, audio, UI, terrain, and localization fixes
